Read lines 1346-1805 from `server/routes/superadmin.js` to get the relevant route handlers.

The new file should:
1. Import express and create a router
2. Import `{ query, queryOne }` from `../../db.js`
3. Import relevant validation schemas from `../../utils/schemas.js`
4. Import `{ getEffectiveTenantId }` from `./middleware.js`
5. Copy route handlers for:
    - GET /ivr-menus
    - POST /ivr-menus
    - DELETE /ivr-menus/:id
    - GET /time-conditions
    - GET /time-groups
    - POST /time-groups
    - DELETE /time-groups/:id
    - POST /time-conditions
    - DELETE /time-conditions/:id
    - GET /sound-files
    - POST /sound-files
    - DELETE /sound-files/:id
    - GET /voicemail-boxes
    - POST /voicemail-boxes
    - DELETE /voicemail-boxes/:id
6. Export router as default

CRITICAL: Copy the route handler code EXACTLY as it appears in the source file.
